canonicalVersion.driftPolicy: All Pi/npm packages and release metadata MUST equal the canonical npm version; the embedded native CLI MUST equal nativeCliVersion. Mixed package versions or unexpected CLI versions are rejected.

packages.installPolicy: The launcher uses exact-version optionalDependencies with npm os, cpu, and libc constraints; it never downloads an executable at install time or runtime.

node.policy: Each release MUST pass acceptance on the minimum version and the current Node.js LTS.

pi.policy: Each release MUST pass the real Pi loader acceptance suite on the minimum and current stable Pi versions; Pi 1.x requires an explicit contract revision.

machineSchema.policy: Reject every unlisted machine schema before consuming command data.

configSchema.policy: Migrate schema 0 copies without mutating their rollback source; reject ambiguous or newer schemas.

indexFormat.policy: Reuse only an exact compatible format. Build an incompatible replacement separately and swap only after validation; failed replacement preserves recoverable prior data.

surface.separation: Pi tools use ExtensionAPI directly. LSP and MCP remain separate integrations; pi-mcp-adapter is not used.

config.rootPolicy: Requested roots are canonicalized and confined to ctx.cwd unless explicit project configuration permits otherwise.

offlineSemantics.policy: A clean supported install performs local semantic indexing and search offline. Optional backends are opt-in and never replace or delay the local default.

dataLifecycle.created: Lazily by the first index or search that requires an index.
dataLifecycle.compatibleUpdate: Reuse the index after compatibility validation.
dataLifecycle.incompatibleUpdate: Build a replacement atomically; retain the previous usable index until replacement succeeds.
dataLifecycle.failedUpdate: Leave the previous data recoverable and report an actionable error.
dataLifecycle.uninstall: Pi removal unloads the package but preserves project .asgrep data.
dataLifecycle.deletion: Only an explicit user request may remove .asgrep data.

updates.mainBranch: Pack and test relevant artifacts; never publish a stable npm version.
updates.officialTag: Every human-approved official version tag prepares and publishes all npm layers at the canonical version in platform, launcher, extension order.
updates.selection: Pi/npm update selects the exact matching extension, launcher, platform binary, and protocol version.
updates.partialPublishRecovery: Move forward with a new immutable version; never overwrite a published npm version.

availabilityObserved.policy: Availability is an observation only; re-verify every name and publisher ownership immediately before first publication.

npm.policy: npm publication is independently gated and does not wait for crates.io availability or ordering.

cratesIo.policy: crates.io publication is independently gated and does not wait for npm availability or ordering.

firstPublication.gate: Before any external registry side effect, a human MUST verify every package name and publisher ownership and approve the protected release environment.

releaseAutomation.idempotence: Refuse dirty, unsigned, wrong-tag, wrong-commit, version-skewed, checksum-incomplete, or already-published releases; immutable versions are never overwritten.
